mapper.sql: SELECT ID, PURCHASE_ID, SUPPLIER_ID, SUPPLIER_NAME, QUOTATION_PRICE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE_COMPARISON
mapper.select: WHERE PURCHASE_ID = #{purchaseId} ORDER BY CREATE_TIME ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE_COMPARISON ( ID, PURCHASE_ID, SUPPLIER_ID, SUPPLIER_NAME, QUOTATION_PRICE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )
SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.purchaseId}, #{item.supplierId}, #{item.supplierName}, #{item.quotationPrice}, #{item.loginUserId}, #{item.loginUserName}, #{item.now} FROM DUAL
